title: Tao Te Ching 40
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 40 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 40 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: Returning is the movement of the Tao. Weakness is the function of the Tao. All things in the world come from being, and being comes from non-being.
